name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met freshman year. She's now a UX designer in Berlin. We bond over indie films and terrible puns.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: Former manager who took a chance on me. Now runs his own startup. Always full of sharp advice.

name: Priya Nair
bio: We backpacked through Southeast Asia together in 2019. Lives in Toronto now. Monthly catch-ups keep us close.

name: Tobias Rüger
bio: Grew up two houses apart. He's the kind of friend who picks up right where you left off, no matter the gap.

name: Aisha Diallo
bio: Met at a local reading group. Passionate about African literature and sourdough baking. Keeps me culturally sharp.

name: Daniel Park
bio: College roommate turned software engineer at Google. We co-wrote a startup pitch that never launched, but the friendship stuck.

name: Lena Hoffman
bio: Met at a morning yoga class three years ago. Now a solid weekly coffee routine. Always brings homemade pastries.

name: Kwame Asante
bio: We worked together at a media agency. Still collaborate on photography projects. Needs a proper catch-up — way overdue.

name: Natasha Ivanova
bio: Met during our MBA. We do biweekly check-ins on life goals. Brutally honest, exactly what I need.

name: Ravi Subramaniam
bio: Workout partner who became a genuine friend. Knows everyone at the gym and motivates without being annoying about it.
